title: フェブラリーSにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's finally time for our first G1 race, the February
Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara is in high spirits after seeing how many
people have come out to watch the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This would be nerve-racking for the typical
Umamusume, but Haru Urara is her usual unfazed,
happy-go-lucky self.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, I promise to take her to see
another G1 race and we head out.
